items.title: Prep for Blast Security product demo call Thursday 9:30am ET
items.context: Email thread on May 11: Boris Vaynberg proposed 'go deeper into the tech and demo the product. How about Thursday morning, 09:30 ET?' — Richie confirmed and Lissette sent the invite.

items.title: Follow up with Barak (Opti) after his US Bank meeting on Tuesday
items.context: Email from Barak Perelman on May 10: 'BTW I'm meeting David @ US Bank on Tue Morning' — opportunity to get feedback on the LP intro and gauge partnership interest.

items.title: Follow up with Simone (Prism Layer) for review materials ahead of May 26 meeting
items.context: Jake asked Simone on Apr 28 to 'share the materials for our review' and bumped again May 8. Materials still not received. In-person meeting with Logan scheduled for May 26 at 10:30am.

items.title: Check in with Roy (Orchid) on new term sheets in ~2 weeks
items.context: Email from Roy Katmor on May 6: 'We passed on a TS this week as the terms didn't align with our backers, but I'm expecting a few more to crop up in the coming weeks. Travel over the next two weeks will slow things down.'

items.title: Monitor VanishID lead investor search — term sheets expected in coming weeks
items.context: Email from Matt Polak on May 4: Q1 FY27 actual ARR $1.17M (148% of forecast), ending ARR $5.92M. Matt said investors are waiting for quarterly results and anticipates term sheets in the coming weeks. Fin expressed interest as syndicate.
